  • [ - ] DanInter - member since 23-Feb-17

    @Marbella This is what I usually refer to as a "trap" match, sure Inter might win but the odds are crap, and it's unlikely to be a walk in the park. Don't know much about how Torino's summer went (I only know Casedei from them since he was an Inter youth), but Baroni started strong with Lazio as well last season, so he will probably prepare them well.

  • [ - ] DanInter - member since 23-Feb-17

    @Marbella Most likely no. Based on what we seen during summer, the defence is very unstable atm, and they didn't really improve the situation as they wanted to during the transfer window. They only managed to sign Diouf (DM), but he is a relatively young player, not the calibre to instantly plug in the leaks in the midfield.
